Heartlight Co-Creator Directory

Create Your C.E.S. Profile

Your Core Energetic Signature is how your frequency resonates in the field

Each being carries a unique Core Energetic Signature that allows for them to co-create in a way that is authentic to them, and allows for all of us to share in a way that feels resonant for our being. The Core Energetic Signature (C.E.S.) Profile holds space for your frequency to connect, create, and share.
✦ Identity
🌟

Speak your truth here. What do you co-create, and why does it matter to your soul?

Select up to 3 Rays. The first you select becomes your Primary Ray and shapes your profile's living color field.

How you support all beings to receive your offerings
🌊 Consent & Boundaries
Share what receivers need to know before entering co-creation with you
🔗 Portfolio, Media & Contact
Where co-creators can witness your work and reach you through the channels you actually want to use.
Add hosted media URLs to showcase your work in the Directory and on your profile.

Choose what the Directory shows when beings are feeling for whether you are open to receive new wishes.

Your frequency is needed here

Every Atlastizen carries a sacred gift. The Exchange grows as each new co-creator arrives — by resonance, invitation, and the call of the Heartlight.

🪙 The Wish Well

Cast a wish into the well, then explore the field of active wishes below.

For Co-Creator Beings
The Wish Field lives just below, woven directly into the Wish Well so beings can cast wishes and answer them in one place.
✨ Wishing Through Your C.E.S. Profile
An active Co-Creator C.E.S. profile is required to cast and grant wishes in the Wish Well
💫 The Wish
Write your wish as a letter, a prayer, a story spark, or a voice from the heart
🎁 How It Arrives
Your preferences for how this co-creation flows to you
🌟 Co-Creator Roles
A wish may be fulfilled by many beings, each bringing their sacred offering. You decide the roles. There may be many Co-Creators within each role.
🌊 Sacred Container
What you need to feel safe within this co-creation
🔒
Privacy Promise
Letters and personal stories receive reverence. Your details stay held within the sacred co-creation container, shared only with your chosen Co-Creator.

A Co-Creator who feels your resonance will respond. When alignment is felt, a Seasonal Co-Creation Agreement will be offered.

What Happens After Your Wish Lands
🌱
RESONANCE MATCH
Co-Creators feel into the wish field and those who resonate with your frequency reach out through the well, guided by consent and seasonal capacity.
📜
SEASONAL CO-CREATION AGREEMENT
Once resonance is felt, a living agreement is co-created between you and the Co-Creator — scope, exchange pathway, seasonal milestones, and a closing blessing. Both beings sign with intention.
🍂
HEARTLIGHT HARVEST
At the Fall Equinox portal, the co-creation completes. Gifts are delivered, value circulates, gratitude lands, and both beings are welcomed into the Storyfire of witnessing.

🔒 Privacy Assurance
The Privacy Assurance is greatly significant to the thrival and harmony of the co-creators of Atlas Island in the Heartlight Exchange.
How Co-Creations Are Shared
🌱
Before the Exchange
Consent Opens the Door
A wish enters the Heartlight Exchange as a sacred letter. Its contents are held with reverence and shared only with Co-Creators who feel genuine resonance. A Co-Creator reads a wish through the lens of care, and any response they offer is an act of consent, not obligation. No wishing being's story is shared beyond the portal without their explicit agreement. The Seasonal Co-Creation Agreement is established before any creative work begins, so both beings enter with full clarity on what will be made, how it will be shared, and with whom.
Data Minimization
Only what supports care, safety, and the exchange is gathered. Nothing more.
Transparent Purpose
Both beings understand clearly why information is shared and how it will be held.
Consent-Forward Entry
Information flows through permission and clarity from the very first moment.
🌞
During the Exchange
The Sacred Container Holds
Once a Seasonal Co-Creation Agreement is signed, the exchange lives inside a sacred container shared only by the wishing being and their Co-Creator. Personal stories, wishes, creative details, and the shape of what is being made remain within that container. Neither being shares the work in progress, the personal content of the wish, nor the nature of the exchange without the other's explicit consent. The boundaries established in the Agreement govern all sharing during the creative seasons of Spring, Summer, and Fall.
Sacred Container
What is shared within the exchange stays within the exchange unless both beings agree otherwise.
Agreement Boundaries
The Seasonal Co-Creation Agreement names what may be shared and protects what may not.
Protective Stewardship
Secure handling, limited access, and respectful retention of all creative and personal material.
🍂
After the Exchange
Witnessing With Permission
At the Fall Harvest, the co-creation completes. The Storyfire of witnessing invites both beings to celebrate what was made together. Sharing the completed creation beyond the exchange, including in the Co-Creator's portfolio or in the Storyfire circle, happens only with the wishing being's full and joyful consent. A Co-Creator does not share, publish, or exhibit the creation without agreement. The wishing being retains sovereignty over their story and the shape of what was made for them, always.
Storyfire Consent
Witnessing and celebration in the Storyfire circle is an invitation, always chosen freely.
Portfolio Agreement
A Co-Creator includes the work in their portfolio only with explicit permission from the wishing being.
Sovereign Story
The wishing being holds sovereignty over their story and how it is shared in the world, always.
📜 Boundaries of the Exchange Agreement
The Seasonal Co-Creation Agreement is the living boundary holder of the exchange. Within it, both beings name what is protected, what may flow outward, and how the creative work lives in the world once it is complete. These boundaries are sacred agreements, held with the same reverence as any Heartlight vow.
🌀
Scope Boundary The Agreement names exactly what is being created. Anything beyond that scope requires a new consent conversation before it comes into being.
🤝
Sharing Boundary The Agreement specifies what may be shared publicly, what stays private, and what requires a new conversation before any sharing occurs.
🔑
Access Boundary Personal stories, wish letters, and creative communications shared within the exchange are accessible only to the beings in the agreement and, when needed, a consented Code Steward.
🌱
Adaptability Boundary If either being wishes to adjust a boundary during the exchange, they bring it forward openly. Boundaries may grow and evolve through mutual resonance and clear communication.
✨
Energetic Ethics Technology within Atlas Island serves life, community, and healing. The exchange platform holds all data in alignment with this principle. No creative work, personal information, or wish content is used for any purpose beyond the sacred container of the exchange itself.
🛡️
A Note on Code Stewards Code Stewards hold the field with conscious awareness. In matters of privacy, a Code Steward may be invited into a situation only with the consent of both beings in the exchange. Their role is to support clarity, hold space for repair, and uphold the boundaries of the Agreement. They carry what is shared with them in full reverence and do not carry it beyond the resolution of the situation.
Atlas Island treats privacy as dignity and sovereignty. In the Heartlight Exchange, what is shared in love is protected in love, and what is created in trust remains in trust until both beings choose how it lives in the world.
📜 Heartlight Exchange Charter

A living vow for Atlas Island's seasonal co-creation economy

✦ How The Exchange Flows
Heartlight Exchange moves through a simple living rhythm: beings join through a C.E.S. Co-Creator Profile, cast and answer wishes through the Wish Well, and then complete co-creations through resonance, agreement, and granting.
1. Create C.E.S. Profile
Join As A Co-Creator
Every being enters through a Core Energetic Signature profile. Your C.E.S. profile holds your resonance, offerings, exchange pathways, and seasonal capacity inside the Heartlight Exchange.
2. Enter The Wish Well
Cast And Answer Wishes
Wishes are cast through an active C.E.S. Co-Creator profile. The same Wish Well lets beings answer wishes, feel resonance, and step forward for the roles they are called to fulfill.
3. Grant Through Co-Creation
Weave The Exchange
When resonance is mutual, the co-creation moves into seasonal agreements, shared stewardship, and eventually into a granted wish that the wish-holder marks as fulfilled.
Heartlight Exchanges exist to harmonize the Ray frequencies of ALL through intentional co-creation. Beings across Earth and beyond may share wishes, requests, offerings, lessons, art, healing, and sacred skill crafted with care by Atlastizens in a mutual energetic exchange.
🌍 Seasonal Exchange Thresholds
The seasonal wheel now lives as one connected threshold map, so each phase touches the next and the co-creation cycle reads as a single living pattern.
🦋 Heartlight Co-Creators
Heartlight Co-Creators are Atlastizens whose occupation is co-creating for ALL through reciprocity. Recipients may select a Co-Creator directly via profiles, and Co-Creators respond through resonance and capacity for that season.
🎁 Exchange Pathways
Every exchange is an act of sacred reciprocity. Heartlight Exchange pathways flow through five forms; choose the one that feels most resonant for each co-creation.
💱
Currency Fixed PriceA clear, agreed-upon offering in exchange for currency. Both beings know what is being exchanged before co-creation begins, held with transparency and care.
🎚️
Currency Sliding ScaleA range of exchange is offered, honoring that different beings hold different access to currency. The Co-Creator sets the range; the receiver chooses with honesty and resonance.
🤝
Value Exchange Trade or Skill SwapOne offering in return for another. Both beings bring their gifts and agree on the scope of what is exchanged. Energy flows in both directions with joy and equity.
🎁
Gift ExchangeA Co-Creator offers their gift freely from their overflow, as an act of love and sacred service. This is clearly named as gifting never assumed, always chosen with sovereignty.
🌱
Scholarship ExchangeCommunity-supported offerings that allow beings to receive who may not have access to other pathways. Scholarships may be offered by Co-Creators or funded through the collective generosity of the Exchange.
🌐 Offerings That Travel Worldwide
✨ Digital Gifts
  • Audio blessings
  • Sigils and sacred art
  • Guided visualizations
  • Ritual pages and scripts
  • Oracle-style messages
  • Mini courses and teachings
  • Music and sound healing
  • Mentorship sessions
  • Community circles
🪄 Physical Gifts
  • Handcrafted talismans
  • Tea blends and apothecary
  • Charms and sacred objects
  • Scrolls and printed art
  • Custom co-created wands, staffs, etc.
  • Altar objects
  • Woven and textile crafts
🤍 Accessibility Promise
Offerings may be created in multiple formats whenever it supports the receiver: text, audio, captioned video, sensory-friendly pacing, simplified steps, multiple time-zone windows.
🔒 Privacy Assurance
The Privacy Assurance is sacred to the thrival and harmony of every co-creator in the Heartlight Exchange. Letters, personal stories, and creative details stay held within the sacred container shared by the receiver and their chosen Co-Creator. Consent governs every moment of sharing before, during, and after the exchange.
💎 The 12 Codes of ALL
The 12 Codes of ALL are the living values that Atlas Island and the Heartlight Exchange uphold. Each Code is held by a Ray frequency and carries its own mantra of practice.
Select a colored hex to open the full resonance of that Code.
✨ Stewardship
A small circle of Stewards holds the directory, Codes, scholarships, seasonal announcements, and gentle conflict resolution through care and clarity.
Join the Heartlight Exchange to share your Core Energetic Signature. Let's make our dreams and wishes come true!
🛡️ Steward Panel
Heartlight Co-Creator Directory — Steward Review
Review each C.E.S. Profile submission with care and resonance. Accept to welcome them into the Heartlight Directory, or return with a note to invite refinement.
🔑 Authorized Steward C.E.S. Codes
Beings whose C.E.S. codes are registered here may access the Steward Field. Each code is held encrypted. The Steward passphrase is also required for entry.
Add C.E.S. Code
Steward Name
Passphrase leave blank to auto-generate
📋 Security Log
All failed access attempts are recorded here. Three consecutive failures trigger a lockout and log entry.
📜 Seasonal Co-Creation Agreement
A living vow between a wishing being and their Heartlight Co-Creator
The wishing being defines the roles. Each role may hold one or many Co-Creator beings.
🌱🌞🍂 Sacred Milestones
🌱
Spring Seed
What begins here
🌞
Summer Bloom
What takes form
🍂
Fall Harvest
What is delivered
🌀 Adaptability Clause (Heartlight-Led Growth): This agreement honors organic unfolding. Either being may propose adjustments to scope, timeline, or form as the co-creation grows — always through open communication, mutual resonance, and the spirit of the Heartlight Exchange Charter.
💎 The Codes of Heartlight govern this agreement: Consent and sovereignty · Kindness and dignity · Cultural respect · Sustainability · Accessibility · Clear communication · Joy, integrity, and sacred play.
💎 The 12 Codes of ALL

Lived values that shape every space, agreement, and expansion on Atlas Island.
In the Heartlight Exchange, these Codes form the sacred container within which every wish, offering, and co-creation flows.

"I uphold the sanctity of this land and the miracle of life.
I honor the 12 Codes of ALL as living practice.
I walk with consent, compassion, and discernment.
I serve harmony through repair, reverence, and co-creation."
— The Oath of Atlas Island
These Codes are lived values. They shape every wish, every offering, every agreement, and every exchange on Atlas Island. To enter the Heartlight Exchange is to carry them forward.
